0X0301.title: No Tour not supported by reader
0X0301.caption: NO_TOUR_NOT_SUPPORTED

0X050C.title: Access attempt while in Restricted Secured
0X050C.caption: ACCESS_WHILE_IN_REST_SECURE

0X0605.title: Audits Lost Before Read
0X0605.caption: AUDIT_BUFFEROVERUN
0X0605.dataDescription: Device not serviced before losing audits

0X070C.title: Motor transition failure, State mismatch found during unlock operation
0X070C.caption: MOTOR_TRANSITION_FAILURE

0X070D.title: Failure of Dogging Latch Hook And Trigger
0X070D.caption: DOG_ON_NEXT_EXIT_FAILURE

0X0711.title: LX Not Seen During RX Event
0X0711.caption: RX_LX_FAILURE

0X0720.title: Keypad entries have been locked out for too many failed attempts
0X0720.caption: KEYPAD_LOCKOUT

0X0901.title: Data Parser Ignored Data
0X0901.caption: PARSE_IGNORED_DATA
0X0901.dataDescription: Ignored one or more JSON tags, including valid Non CERT tags (valid form but not supported)

0X0A02.title: Real Time Clock Value Changed
0X0A02.caption: TIME_CHANGE
0X0A02.dataDescription: Data representes the timedifference LSB in seconds (defaulted to 0x0000, when no data or not applicable)

0X0A03.title: Real Time Clock Value Changed (MSB)
0X0A03.caption: TIME_CHANGE
0X0A03.dataDescription: Data representes the timedifference MSB in seconds only when presents

0X0B03.title: Wi-Fi RSSI Value (in -dBm)
0X0B03.caption: WIFI_RSSI
0X0B03.dataDescription: RSSI DB Value (Received Signal Strength Indicator)

0X0B06.title: Valid HTTP Header Received via Wi-Fi
0X0B06.caption: WIFI_GOT_VALID_HTTP_HEAD

0X0B0C.title: WIFI HTTP Error
0X0B0C.caption: WIFI_HTTP_ERROR
0X0B0C.dataDescription: WiFi HTTP Error (XXXX = hex value of standard HTTP error)

0X0B0E.title: New Access Point Configuration Change
0X0B0E.caption: WIFI_NEW_AP_UPDATE
0X0B0E.dataDescription: New Access Point Config is successfully accepted

0X0D04.title: Reader Power Mode
0X0D04.caption: RDR_PWR_MODE
0X0D04.dataDescription: Normal - all reader technologies enabled ASK, FSK - low frequency HF - High Frequency TSI - Touch Sense Input (cap sense)

0X0D05.title: Reader State
0X0D05.caption: RDR_STATE
0X0D05.dataDescription: Reader state during card read Idle

0X0D06.title: N- Samples
0X0D06.caption: N_SAMPLES
0X0D06.dataDescription: Number of Cap Sense Circuit Scans

0X0D07.title: Delta
0X0D07.caption: DELTA
0X0D07.dataDescription: Value of cap sense reader sensitivity

0X0D08.title: Old False Detect Value
0X0D08.caption: OLD_FALSE_DETECT
0X0D08.dataDescription: Number of occurrences that hardware scan (cap sense circuit) detects above upper threshold setting

0X0D09.title: New False Detect Value
0X0D09.caption: NEW_FALSE_DETECT
0X0D09.dataDescription: Number of occurrences hardware scan (cap sense circuit) and 2 software scans detects above upper threshold setting

0X0D0A.title: Baseline - Upper 2 bytes
0X0D0A.caption: BASELINE_UPPER
0X0D0A.dataDescription: Upper 2 bytes of proximity detect baseline value

0X0D0B.title: Baseline - Lower 2 bytes
0X0D0B.caption: BASELINE_LOWER
0X0D0B.dataDescription: Lower 2 bytes of proximity detect baseline value

0X0D0C.title: Inter Board Error
0X0D0C.caption: IB_ERROR
0X0D0C.dataDescription: nWake assert error - Monitoring the GPIO line in between reader and main board

0X1100.title: HMAC Validation Passed
0X1100.caption: HMAC_VALIDATION_PASSED
0X1100.dataDescription: Type: SHA1 (0x01), Code: Successful validation, no data (0x00)

0X1101.title: HMAC Validation Failed
0X1101.caption: HMAC_VALIDATION_FAILED
0X1101.dataDescription: Type: SHA1 (0x01), Code: Digest or Timestamp Failure (0x01)

0X1205.title: Ethernet WS Close
0X1205.caption: ETHERNET_WS_CLOSE_EVENT
0X1205.dataDescription: WS Connection Close - Protocol Error Detected

0X1300.title: Credential not in DB. Bit length of credential. Audit disabled in default config.
0X1300.caption: CRED_NOT_IN_DB_BIT_LENGTH
0X1300.dataDescription: XXXX = bit length of presented credential that is not in database. Credential data in following audits. Current max length support is 64 bits.

0X1301.title: Credential not in DB. Bits 15 to 0 of credential. Audit disabled in default config.
0X1301.caption: CRED_NOT_IN_DB_BITS_15_TO_0
0X1301.dataDescription: XXXX = Bits 15 to 0 of credential. Padded with 0's if credential doesn't fill all bits in audit.

0X1302.title: Credential not in DB. Bits 31 to 16 of credential. (Optional, only generated if CRED_NOT_IN_DB_BIT_LENGTH is greater tha 16 bits) Audit disabled in default config.
0X1302.caption: CRED_NOT_IN_DB_BITS_31_TO_16
0X1302.dataDescription: XXXX = Bits 31 to 16 of credential. Padded with 0's if credential doesn't fill all bits in audit.

0X1303.title: Credential not in DB. Bits 47 to 32 of credential. (Optional, only generated if CRED_NOT_IN_DB_BIT_LENGTH is greater tha 32 bits) Audit disabled in default config.
0X1303.caption: CRED_NOT_IN_DB_BITS_47_TO_32
0X1303.dataDescription: XXXX = Bits 47 to 32 of credential. Padded with 0's if credential doesn't fill all bits in audit.

0X1304.title: Credential not in DB. Bits 63 to 48 of credential. (Optional, only generated if CRED_NOT_IN_DB_BIT_LENGTH is greater tha 48 bits) Audit disabled in default config.
0X1304.caption: CRED_NOT_IN_DB_BITS_63_TO_48
0X1304.dataDescription: XXXX = Bits 63 to 48 of credential. Padded with 0's if credential doesn't fill all bits in audit.

0X1500.title: Capture of short DHCP lease time (in seconds) assigned to device, value refreshed upon value change when lease time < Y minutes. Value set to 0 when device configured for static IP. Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X1500.caption: SYSHMON_DHCP_SHORT_LEASE_TIME

0X1501.title: Capture of DHCP network change events since host server connection established. Value refreshed upon event capture. (compiled code won't lead to function handling network changed). Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X1501.caption: SYSHMON_DHCP_NETWORK_CHANGED
0X1501.dataDescription: count of DHCP network change events

0X1502.title: Capture of counts DHCP client received NAK response since host server connection established. Value refreshed upon event capture. Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X1502.caption: SYSHMON_DHCP_CLIENT_RECV_NAK
0X1502.dataDescription: count of DHCP client NAK events

0X1503.title: Capture of counts DHCP client declines offered IP address (i.e. address already in use by another host as determined through ARP) since host server connection established. Value refreshed upon event capture. Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X1503.caption: SYSHMON_DHCP_CLIENT_DECLINE
0X1503.dataDescription: count of DHCP client decline events

0X1504.title: Capture of network receive timeout events since host server connection established. Value refreshed upon event capture. Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X1504.caption: SYSHMON_NETWORK_RX_TIMEOUTS
0X1504.dataDescription: count of network receive timeout events

0X1505.title: Capture of network receive error events since host server connection established. Value refreshed upon event capture. Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X1505.caption: SYSHMON_NETWORK_RX_ERRORS

0X1506.title: Capture of network transmit timeout events since host server connection established. Value refreshed upon event capture. Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X1506.caption: SYSHMON_NETWORK_TX_TIMEOUTS
0X1506.dataDescription: count of network transmit timeout events

0X1507.title: Capture of network transmit error events since host server connection established. Value refreshed upon event capture. Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X1507.caption: SYSHMON_NETWORK_TX_ERRORS
0X1507.dataDescription: count of network transmit timeout events

0X150A.title: Hi capture of TCPIP heap memory usage at/above 70% of allocated space since host server connection established. Value refreshed upon value change, polled every 1 second. Value Reset upon server host re-connect.
0X150A.caption: SYSHMON_TCPIP_HEAP_MEM_MARK
0X150A.dataDescription: Memory mark uaage of TCPIP heap

0XEFFF.title: (entire block held for customer use, Allegion shall not use)
0XEFFF.caption: (entire block held for customer use, Allegion shall not use)
0XEFFF.dataDescription: (entire block held for customer use, Allegion shall not use)
